title: Air Traffic Control Awareness and Wildlife Strikes
description: It's a bird! It's a plane! Ever wonder what was the cause of the Miracle on the Hudson? In this dashboard we look at what the effect of a well informed warned pilot vs. a uninformed warned pilot has in helping control damage cost, as well as keeping guests on their planes safe during flight.
stepByStepContent:
Air Traffic Control Awareness and Wildlife Strikes
It's a bird! It's a plane! Ever wonder what was the cause of the Miracle on the Hudson? In this dashboard we look at what the effect of a well informed warned pilot vs. a uninformed warned pilot has in helping control damage cost, as well as keeping guests on their planes safe during flight.
Step Name:Final Dashboard Comparison
Detailed Instructions:

Congratulations you should have a final dashboard now. Download this file  and compare yours to it. Below you will see a GIF with me walking through some of the data by slicing it.

Step Name:Create Logo and Title for Project
Detailed Instructions:

STEP 1: Download the images needed to create this step from the   above. 

STEP 2: Create the Colaberry Logo. Click Insert inside the top toolbar, select image, find the Colaberry logo and select. 

STEP 3: Format size and location of Colaberry Logo. The image displays what should be in the General tab.

STEP 4: Create the Airplane Logo. Click Insert at inside the top toolbar, select image, find the Airplane Logo and select. Format of this will also be done in this step. 

STEP 5: Create the Birds Logo. Click Insert at inside the top toolbar, select image, find the Birds Logo and select. Format of this will also be done in this step. 

STEP 6: Create the Title for our dashboard. Click Insert then text box, select the font size as 24 then center the alignment, next you will format the size and location of the text box, finally format the background. 

All steps are shown in the GIF below.

Insight:

Step Name:Creating 3 Slicers
Detailed Instructions:

STEP 1: Create the Year, Quarter, Month Slicer. Choose the slicer visualization, next choose Year, Quarter, Month from the Date Hierarchy columns, then hover over the dropdown arrow to the top right of the slicer and choose dropdown.

STEP 2: Create Phase of Flight Slicer. This is illustrated by using a GIF, follow along to create this slicer. You will copy and paste the previous slicer. Ctrl C to copy and Ctrl V to paste.

STEP 3: Create the Region Slicer. This is illustrated by using a GIF, follow along to create this slicer. You will copy and paste the previous slicer. Ctrl C to copy and Ctrl V to paste.

STEP 1: Create the Year, Quarter, Month Slicer. Choose the slicer visualization, next choose Year, Quarter, Month from the Date Hierarchy columns, then hover over the dropdown arrow to the top right of the slicer and choose dropdown.

STEP 2: Create Phase of Flight Slicer. This is illustrated by using a GIF, follow along to create this slicer.

 

STEP 4: Create the Region Slicer. This is illustrated by using a GIF, follow along to create this slicer.

portfolioContent.title: Air Traffic Control Awareness and Wildlife Strikes
portfolioContent.portfolioSummary: Developed a Power BI dashboard analyzing pilot awareness impact on wildlife strike damage and passenger safety in aviation.
portfolioContent.summary: This project created a comprehensive Power BI dashboard to analyze the effects of pilot awareness on wildlife strike incidents. It compares outcomes between well-informed warned pilots and uninformed pilots to assess damage costs and passenger safety. The data was sourced and modeled using SQL Server to enable detailed reporting and insights.
portfolioContent.businessProblem: Wildlife strikes pose significant risks to aircraft safety and can lead to costly damages and passenger injuries. There is a need to understand how pilot awareness and timely warnings influence these outcomes. Improving pilot information could reduce damage costs and enhance flight safety.
objectives: Analyze the impact of pilot warnings on wildlife strike damage costs
Compare safety outcomes between informed and uninformed pilots
Develop an interactive dashboard for data-driven decision making
skills: SQL querying and data mart creation
workflow: Load and prepare wildlife strike data using SQL Server
Import and model data within Power BI
Create visual elements including slicers and KPI cards
Develop measures to compare warned vs. unwarned pilot impacts
Design and finalize the interactive dashboard for insights
keyInsights: Well-informed warned pilots contribute to lower damage costs from wildlife strikes
Passenger safety improves when pilots receive timely wildlife strike warnings
Data slicing by time and flight phase reveals patterns in strike incidents
Interactive KPIs highlight critical metrics such as total deaths and injuries
businessImpact: Enhanced decision-making through real-time wildlife strike analytics
Reduced operational costs by mitigating damage via improved pilot awareness
Improved passenger safety by promoting timely pilot warnings
